# Oria WA150KM freezer and fridge thermometer
# {N}<hex>
#
# Source: https://github.com/merbanan/rtl_433/issues/3136
#
# 26 distinct decoded readings out of 71 real captures across the two
# attachments referenced in the issue (WA144_Samples.zip from janiwe,
# g003_433.92M_250k.zip from AJolly), deduplicated by decoded output.
# Each `{227}` code is the raw OOK_PCM row exactly as rtl_433 itself
# demodulates it (pre-Manchester-decode), same representation the
# decoder's own bitbuffer_search operates on.

# g001_433.92M_250k.cu8
